'''''The Empire Strikes Back Weekly'' 131''' is the one hundred thirty-first issue of the ''[[The Empire Strikes Back Weekly]]'' series of comic reprints, published on [[August 28]], [[1980]].

==Contents==
*[[Star Wars (1977) 43|''Star Wars'' (1977) 43]] {{C|Part 2}}
*"Heroes of the Galaxy: Gullivar Jones, Warrior of Mars!"
*"Monsters of the Cosmos: The Destiny of Dinosaurs"
*"Tales of the Watcher: The Worst Man on Earth!"
